name: Mike Hollingshead
title: Chairman/Owner
bio: Founded SRM in 1999. A concrete finisher turned entrepreneur who built the company from the ground up through faith and hard work.

name: Jeff Hollingshead
title: Chief Executive Officer
bio: Grew up in the business and became CEO in 2014, leading SRM's growth into one of the largest ready-mix producers in the country.

name: Ryan Hollingshead
title: SRM Materials President
bio: Grew up in the business alongside his brother and serves as President of the materials division.
